title: Huawei IdeaHub Board 3 Pro - Interactive Display, 75"
description: Huawei IdeaHub Board 3 Pro is a 75" interactive 4K display with âSoft-Lightâ technology that reduces eye strain, designed for meetings, training, and education. The display supports 20-point touch and low writing latency, ensuring smooth pen operation. It allows wireless screen sharing via Wi-Fi Direct and features built-in speakers and microphones. An optional OPS module enables running Windows alongside the native HarmonyOS system The whiteboard offers USB-C , USB-A , HDMI IN/OUT , LAN and audio input/output ports for connecting external devices. It supports centralized management via IdeaManager , remote OTA updates and provides a high level of security , including separate storage of sensitive data and CC EAL6+ certification. Users can write, draw, work with multiple windows simultaneously and easily save or share content via QR code Device (2) Touch pens Power cable (3m) Quick Start Guide
